title: Remove payment gate from student sign-in and fix admin dropdown for sessions/materials

requirements.text: Remove all payment gate and access code checks from the student sign-in flow. Any student who logs in via Internet Identity must be granted immediate access to the student portal regardless of payment status, active/pending/approved flag, or access code. The 'payment is still pending approval' block and any similar payment-based login interruption must be fully removed.

quotes: anyone who log in and register should be able to access the student's portal
no access code, nothing is required while registration only they have to register
if it is active student payment should not occur
for sign in, any student can sign in with the identity authentication, no access code and anything required for the sign in

acceptanceCriteria: A student who logs in via Internet Identity is never shown a 'payment pending' or 'access code required' error screen
Active students, pending students, and newly registered students can all log in and reach the student dashboard without interruption
The existing student registration flow and Internet Identity authentication mechanism remain unchanged

requirements.text: The admin dashboard Students section must display all registered students (regardless of payment status) with their payment and active status clearly shown for each student.

quotes: all the students who registered, did the payment have informed and have, I mean the admin have information about the students and visible on the dashboard
Admin can see all registered students and their payment/active status

acceptanceCriteria: Admin dashboard Students page lists every registered student
Each student row shows their payment status (e.g., pending, paid/active) and active status badge
Students who have paid and are active are visually distinguished from pending students

requirements.text: In the admin ManageStudentSessions page, the student selector dropdown must be populated with all students who have booked or registered for a session (enrolled/active students). The admin must be able to select any such student from the dropdown and add sessions specifically for that student. Currently there is no option to add a student even if they have booked — this must be fixed so enrolled/booked students always appear in the dropdown.

quotes: student that is enrolled that is booked the session and that is registered for the session should appear in the admin dashboard as booked as active student and I can add for that student I can add sessions
I am not have any option to add any student if the student is booked also okay so make it

acceptanceCriteria: The student dropdown in ManageStudentSessions shows all enrolled/booked/active students
Admin can select a student from the dropdown and add a session for that specific student
Sessions added for a student are saved and visible under that student's record
No existing session structure or fields are changed

requirements.text: In the admin ManageStudentMaterials page, the student selector dropdown must be populated with all students who are enrolled or registered (same logic as sessions). The admin must be able to select any such student from the dropdown and add materials specifically for that student. This mirrors the sessions fix: enrolled students must always appear in the materials dropdown.

quotes: similar thing similar thing for the materials as I have said for the sessions
enrolled/registered students appear in the materials section
Admin can select a student from a dropdown and add materials for each specific student

acceptanceCriteria: The student dropdown in ManageStudentMaterials shows all enrolled/registered/active students
Admin can select a student from the dropdown and add materials for that specific student
Materials added for a student are saved and visible under that student's record
No existing materials structure or fields are changed

requirements.text: Update the backend actor to remove any payment status or access code validation that blocks student login or portal access. Student authentication via Internet Identity should only verify that the principal exists; no payment gate, approval status check, or access code check should prevent a logged-in student from accessing their data.

quotes: if it is active student payment should not occur okay if he's active student the payment thing will not occur
anyone who log in and register should be able to access the student's portal

acceptanceCriteria: Backend does not return a payment-pending or access-denied error for any authenticated student principal attempting to access their own sessions, materials, or profile
Admin-only operations remain protected by admin-only guards
Existing data schema and session/material/attendance APIs are unchanged

constraints: Do not change the existing student registration flow or any registration form fields
Do not change the existing session structure (fields, schema, or existing session management logic)
Do not change the existing materials structure
Internet Identity remains the only authentication method for students
Admin-only guards must remain in place for all admin operations
nonGoals: Stripe or any external payment processing integration
Automatic payment verification or webhook-based payment confirmation
Changes to the admin login flow
Changes to the student profile or course enrollment logic beyond what is required for the dropdown fix
